control_points.name: Invoice Creation Validation
control_points.description: Invoice must be created and stored in DB
control_points.expected: Invoice exists in DB with valid totals

control_points.name: Draft Invoice Persistence
control_points.description: Draft invoices must persist before finalization
control_points.expected: Draft invoice is persisted with draft status

control_points.name: Invoice Number Assignment
control_points.description: Finalized invoices must receive a document number
control_points.expected: Finalized invoice has a generated document number

control_points.name: Invoice Totals Accuracy
control_points.description: Taxable, tax, and grand totals must remain consistent
control_points.expected: Stored totals equal the sum of invoice lines and VAT

control_points.name: Invoice Customer Link
control_points.description: Invoices must be linked to a valid customer
control_points.expected: Invoice references an existing customer record

control_points.name: Invoice Payment Status
control_points.description: Invoice payment status must track open, partial, and paid states
control_points.expected: Invoice balance and status reflect recorded payments

control_points.name: Invoice Finalization Guard
control_points.description: Finalized invoices must reject mutable updates
control_points.expected: Finalized invoices cannot be edited without a correction flow

control_points.name: Invoice Ledger Posting
control_points.description: Finalized invoices must create ledger entries
control_points.expected: A journal entry exists for each finalized invoice

control_points.name: Invoice Route Coverage
control_points.description: Invoice API routes must be reachable
control_points.expected: Invoice create, show, and finalize routes return success

control_points.name: Invoice Workflow Proof
control_points.description: Invoice workflow must be executable end to end
control_points.expected: Invoice workflow proof shows draft to paid completion

control_points.name: Chart Of Accounts Availability
control_points.description: Baseline accounts must exist for each company
control_points.expected: Required chart of accounts codes are present

control_points.name: Journal Entry Creation
control_points.description: Journal entries must persist for transactional postings
control_points.expected: Journal entries are stored with source references

control_points.name: Balanced Journal Lines
control_points.description: Debits and credits must remain balanced
control_points.expected: Each journal entry balances to zero

control_points.name: Payment Ledger Posting
control_points.description: Payments must generate accounting lines
control_points.expected: Payment posting creates journal evidence

control_points.name: Manual Journal Route
control_points.description: Manual journal routes must work
control_points.expected: Manual journal list and create routes are available

control_points.name: Trial Balance Availability
control_points.description: Trial balance report must be reachable
control_points.expected: Trial balance API responds with report data

control_points.name: Profit Loss Availability
control_points.description: Profit and loss report must be reachable
control_points.expected: Profit and loss API responds with report data

control_points.name: Account Period Support
control_points.description: Accounting periods must exist for operational posting
control_points.expected: Posting occurs inside an open accounting period

control_points.name: Audit Trail Persistence
control_points.description: Accounting actions must preserve source references
control_points.expected: Journal entries retain source type and source id

control_points.name: Accounting Workflow Proof
control_points.description: Accounting workflow must run end to end
control_points.expected: Workflow proof confirms journal and report updates

control_points.name: Inventory Receipt Persistence
control_points.description: Inventory receipts must persist in DB
control_points.expected: Inventory stock receipt rows exist in DB

control_points.name: Inventory Stock Route
control_points.description: Inventory stock routes must work
control_points.expected: Inventory stock list and create routes are reachable

control_points.name: Inventory Quantity Tracking
control_points.description: On-hand quantities must update after movements
control_points.expected: Inventory quantity reflects receipts, adjustments, and sales

control_points.name: Inventory Sale Posting
control_points.description: Inventory sales must post accounting entries
control_points.expected: Inventory sale creates linked journal entries

control_points.name: Inventory Adjustment Posting
control_points.description: Adjustments must post write-off or gain entries
control_points.expected: Inventory adjustment creates journal evidence

control_points.name: Inventory Document Links
control_points.description: Inventory sales must retain linked documents
control_points.expected: Inventory records store related invoice and delivery links

control_points.name: Inventory Reduction On Invoice
control_points.description: Selling stocked items must reduce stock
control_points.expected: Inventory quantity decreases after sale workflow

control_points.name: Inventory Account Mapping
control_points.description: Inventory transactions must use mapped accounts
control_points.expected: Inventory journals contain expected account codes

control_points.name: Inventory Dummy Data Coverage
control_points.description: Inventory dummy data must include at least ten records
control_points.expected: Seeded inventory dataset contains ten or more rows

control_points.name: Inventory Workflow Proof
control_points.description: Inventory workflow must be executable end to end
control_points.expected: Workflow proof shows receipt, adjustment, and sale completion

control_points.name: VAT Category Availability
control_points.description: VAT tax categories must exist per company
control_points.expected: VAT15 category exists for active companies

control_points.name: Output VAT Calculation
control_points.description: Sales invoices must calculate output VAT
control_points.expected: Invoice tax totals match configured VAT rate

control_points.name: VAT Ledger Recording
control_points.description: Finalized invoices must store VAT ledger metadata
control_points.expected: Compliance metadata records output VAT evidence

control_points.name: VAT Summary Report
control_points.description: VAT summary report must be reachable
control_points.expected: VAT summary API returns data

control_points.name: VAT Detail Report
control_points.description: VAT detail report must be reachable
control_points.expected: VAT detail API returns data

control_points.name: Buyer VAT Capture
control_points.description: Tax invoices must retain buyer VAT data when required
control_points.expected: Buyer VAT metadata is stored on taxable invoices

control_points.name: Seller VAT Capture
control_points.description: Seller VAT number must be attached to compliance metadata
control_points.expected: Seller VAT number exists in compliance metadata

control_points.name: VAT Dummy Data Coverage
control_points.description: Dummy data must include VAT-bearing documents
control_points.expected: Seeded documents contain taxable totals and VAT totals

control_points.name: VAT Payment Linkage
control_points.description: Payments against invoices must preserve VAT-ready evidence
control_points.expected: Paid invoices still retain VAT ledger metadata

control_points.name: VAT Workflow Proof
control_points.description: VAT workflow must be provable end to end
control_points.expected: Workflow proof confirms VAT calculation and reporting

control_points.name: Invoice Workspace Route
control_points.description: Invoice workspace route must render
control_points.expected: Invoice workspace UI route is reachable

control_points.name: Inventory Workspace Route
control_points.description: Inventory workspace route must render
control_points.expected: Inventory workspace UI route is reachable

control_points.name: Accounting Workspace Route
control_points.description: Accounting workspace route must render
control_points.expected: Accounting workspace UI route is reachable

control_points.name: Reports Workspace Route
control_points.description: Reports workspace route must render
control_points.expected: Reports workspace UI route is reachable

control_points.name: Document Validation Surface
control_points.description: Document validation UI must expose proof controls
control_points.expected: Document validation surface loads without blockers

control_points.name: Sales Workflow Surface
control_points.description: Sales workflow UI must expose evidence capture controls
control_points.expected: Sales workflow UI loads and supports evidence capture

control_points.name: Accounting Workflow Surface
control_points.description: Accounting workflow UI must expose evidence capture controls
control_points.expected: Accounting workflow UI loads and supports evidence capture

control_points.name: Navigation Health
control_points.description: Primary workflow routes must be navigable
control_points.expected: Workflow routes can be opened without 404s

control_points.name: Audit Dashboard Health
control_points.description: Audit dashboard route must render audit results
control_points.expected: Audit UI displays runtime results

control_points.name: UX Workflow Proof
control_points.description: UI proof must exist for the audited workflow
control_points.expected: Captured UI proof confirms reachable workflow surfaces

control_points.name: Audit Engine Runtime
control_points.description: Audit engine must execute without static PASS output
control_points.expected: Audit engine returns evidence-based statuses

control_points.name: Audit Artifact Output
control_points.description: Audit engine must write a machine-readable report
control_points.expected: engine-audit-report.json is generated

control_points.name: Root Cause Output
control_points.description: Root cause engine must classify failures
control_points.expected: root-cause-report.json is generated with classifications

control_points.name: Control Point Inventory Output
control_points.description: Control point inventory must be written
control_points.expected: control-point-inventory.json is generated

control_points.name: Execution Log Output
control_points.description: Execution log must capture step timings
control_points.expected: execution-log.md records step timings

control_points.name: Execution Time Report
control_points.description: Execution time report must capture step durations
control_points.expected: execution-time-report.md is generated

control_points.name: Audit Retry Loop
control_points.description: Audit engine must support rerun cycles
control_points.expected: At least three audit cycles can be executed

control_points.name: Critical Failure Detection
control_points.description: Critical failures must never be reported as PASS
control_points.expected: Critical failures are surfaced as FAIL or BLOCKED

control_points.name: Evidence Coverage
control_points.description: Audit findings must include DB, route, and API evidence where applicable
control_points.expected: Audit records include evidence details

control_points.name: Audit Final Status
control_points.description: Audit final state must be computed from findings
control_points.expected: Audit summary reflects real counts from results

control_points.name: Contact Import Readiness
control_points.description: Contact import data contracts must exist
control_points.expected: Import data contracts include contact fields

control_points.name: Item Import Readiness
control_points.description: Item import data contracts must exist
control_points.expected: Import data contracts include item fields

control_points.name: Invoice Import Readiness
control_points.description: Invoice import data contracts must exist
control_points.expected: Import data contracts include invoice fields

control_points.name: Import Route Coverage
control_points.description: Import endpoints must be reachable where implemented
control_points.expected: Implemented import routes return expected responses

control_points.name: Import Validation Rules
control_points.description: Import validation must reject malformed records
control_points.expected: Import validation surfaces field-level errors

control_points.name: Import Artifact Coverage
control_points.description: Import flows must produce evidence when audited
control_points.expected: Audit evidence references import readiness checks

control_points.name: Template Import Mapping
control_points.description: Imported templates must preserve field mapping
control_points.expected: Template imports map known fields correctly

control_points.name: Bulk Data Integrity
control_points.description: Bulk import must retain record counts
control_points.expected: Imported counts match accepted records

control_points.name: Import User Access
control_points.description: Import features must remain access controlled
control_points.expected: Unauthorized import calls are rejected

control_points.name: Import Workflow Proof
control_points.description: Import readiness must be auditable
control_points.expected: Audit proof captures import validations or missing implementations
